description: Durable confirmatory-readiness and analysis-freeze governance record for the Lumen Route A study. Created at Phase 6B-2 closure, prior to full data collection.

test_subject_A.max_output_tokens: to be recorded on first full run
test_subject_A.access_date: to be recorded on first full run

test_subject_B.max_output_tokens: to be recorded on first full run
test_subject_B.access_date: to be recorded on first full run

model_freeze.separation_constraint: claude-sonnet-4-6 (contract-generation LLM) must not be used as a test subject. Verified: neither frozen test subject is claude-sonnet-4-6.

confirmatory_family.primary_endpoint: H1 on T2 (bug detection composite score 0-3)
confirmatory_family.aggregation: per-function mean score across both frozen models before testing

full_t2_plan.description: Pre-validated full T2 confirmatory run plan for 30 retained functions × 5 conditions × 2 models.
full_t2_plan.planner_command: PYTHONPATH=src /Users/takumi/.pyenv/versions/3.11.5/bin/python3 -m experiment.run_pilot --models gpt-5.4 claude-opus-4-6 --tasks T2 --conditions C1 C1+ C2 C3 C4 --run-id full_t2_confirmatory --dry-run

manifest_flags_post_6b1.note: C1+ and C3/C4 availability flags updated in functions_manifest.json by Phase 6B-1

t2_test_quality.note: 18 T2 test stubs lack live test cases. These stubs satisfy validate_dataset_contracts but do not provide runtime verification of T2 fix correctness. Upgrading stubs to live tests is a pre-collection quality gate (non-blocking for plan validation, blocking for first run launch).

reproducibility_record.note: Access dates and max output token limits for gpt-5.4 and claude-opus-4-6 must be filled in docs/experimental-protocol.md §8.2 on the day of first full experimental run.

t1_t3_full_runs.note: This governance record covers T2 only. T1 and T3 full runs require separate planning once T2 confirmatory analysis is complete.
